description: The LabelPointerMesh component is used by the labeler tool to point to a position and underline some generated text elements.

fields.LabelPoint: Where the label should render in local space.
fields.TargetPoint: Where the line from the label should point to.
fields.LabelRotation: The rotation of the label visual.
fields.LabelWidth: The width of the label visual.
fields.Width: The width of the line going from the label to ``TargetPoint``
fields.ExpandLerp: How long the label underline should be.
fields.DualSided: Whether the mesh should have duplicate geometry with the fronts facing the opposite direction.
